phrases.intent_en: Ask what time the basilica opens
phrases.text_local: À quelle heure la basilique ouvre-t-elle ?
phrases.pronunciation: ah kel UR lah bah-zee-LEEK oovr-TEL
phrases.cultural_note: The basilica is open daily but hours vary. The famous AURA light show runs most evenings — worth booking ahead.

phrases.intent_en: Buy a ticket for the AURA light show
phrases.text_local: Je voudrais deux billets pour le spectacle AURA, s'il vous plaît.
phrases.pronunciation: zhuh voo-DREH duh bee-YEH poor luh spek-TAHKL oh-RAH seel voo PLEH
phrases.cultural_note: AURA is an immersive light and sound show projected onto the basilica's interior. Book online to avoid disappointment.

responses.english: It is twenty-five dollars per person.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if photography is allowed inside
phrases.text_local: Est-ce qu'on peut prendre des photos à l'intérieur ?
phrases.pronunciation: ess-KON puh PRAHN-druh day fo-TOH ah lan-tay-RYUR
phrases.cultural_note: Photography is generally permitted for personal use. Flash and tripods are typically restricted during services.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the gift shop is
phrases.pronunciation: ex-koo-ZAY mwah, oo EH lah boo-TEEK soo-vuh-NEER
phrases.cultural_note: The gift shop carries religious items, books, and local crafts. A popular spot for high-quality Québec-made souvenirs.

responses.english: On the left, near the exit.
responses.phonetic: ah GOHSH pray duh lah sor-TEE
responses.french: À gauche, près de la sortie.

phrases.intent_en: Compliment the beauty of the basilica
phrases.cultural_note: The basilica's neo-Gothic interior features deep blue vaulted ceilings studded with gold stars — locals are proud of it.
